data.title: As a DSO agent running ui-designer, I can query USWDS component and design token guidance to inform component recommendations for federal web applications
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Populates plugins/dso/data/ui-reference/components/ with USWDS component guidance, design tokens, and interaction patterns from uswds/uswds (CC0 licensed). Manually updates _index.yaml with all new entries.

**Why**: USWDS is the canonical design system for federal web applications. The ui-designer agent needs USWDS component guidance to recommend compliant, accessible components rather than generic web patterns.

**Scope**:
- IN: USWDS v3 components (form inputs, buttons, navigation, alerts/banners, modals, tables, typography, cards, pagination, date picker, file input) with component guidance and token references; domain: [components]; license: CC0-1.0; Summary + Detail tiers
- OUT: USWDS source code or CSS implementation details; accessibility compliance patterns (belong in Story-4); non-USWDS design systems

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, components/uswds-patterns.md (and/or adjacent files) covers USWDS v3 components including at minimum: form inputs, buttons, navigation, alerts, banners, modals, tables, typography, cards; each entry has YAML frontmatter with domain: [components], component: [<uswds-component-name>], compliance: [section-508], license: CC0-1.0 and Summary + Detail tiers; no entry file exceeds 500 lines
  ← Satisfies: SC4 (USWDS component and token guidance)

- When this story is complete, USWDS form-related entries use component: [form] tag; these tag values are documented in a comment at the top of the components/ files (Story-6 precision query contract: "USWDS form validation" expects component: [form])
  ← Satisfies: SC4 + Story-6 precision query contract

- When this story is complete, _index.yaml is manually updated with all new USWDS entries and committed; check-corpus-schema.sh --validate-index passes
  ← Satisfies: SC2

- When this story is complete, check-corpus-schema.sh passes on all components/ USWDS files
  ← Satisfies: SC1

- When this story is complete, dso ref-query "USWDS form validation" returns a top result with component: [form] in its frontmatter
  ← Satisfies: SC4 + SC3

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Entries reference USWDS v3.x specifically; note the USWDS version in the source field and docs/ui-reference-sources.yaml pinned version
- [Reliability] All USWDS entries must use license: CC0-1.0; verify against uswds/uswds repository LICENSE file before committing

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
